examples: Big concert halls do not faze Melanie.
Melanie plunked her cosmetic case down on a chair.
"My hair is dancing in the air," Melanie laughed happily.
Melanie and I had stopped in the night before to chat with head brewer Nate Ryske.
Robredo beat John Isner 6-7 6-3 7-6 after Sanchez saw off American Melanie Oudin 6-4 6-4.
